text.title: Async Standup Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on three observables (team_size, timezone_gap_hours, engagement_duration_days) to apply / skip / replace-with-weekly-update. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: apply async standup with 3-field post + 12h blocker SLA
skip — overhead exceeds value for short engagements
skip — verbal standup is faster for co-located teams
apply Scrum daily or full Scrum cadence; this template is sized for ≤3

text.example: team_size=2 → timezone_gap_hours=6 → engagement_duration_days=42 → apply async standup (rule r1-three-field-shape).
